aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are somewhat likely to cite P&M Mechanical due to their strong local presence and decent content, but gaps in structured data and conversational content limit their visibility.
quick_wins: Expand content with conversational FAQs and How-To guides

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Torrance' and 'emergency HVAC solutions'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness schema and expanding FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC experts by showcasing certifications, case studies, and detailed service explanations.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making P&M Mechanical the go-to HVAC expert in Torrance.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models struggle to cite them due to a lack of structured data and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, expands conversational content, and leverages their existing strengths to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer they wait, the more ground they lose.

email_subject_line: Maximize AI Visibility: Boost Your HVAC Leads in Torrance
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and found exciting opportunities to make P&M Mechanical stand out to AI-driven search users.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more leads.
